programmes.show_description: Thriller with Bruce Willis. Three Midwestern brothers, a crime lord, and an incorruptible cop are on a deadly collision course when the youngest brother's fiancée is kidnapped by traffickers.
High-octane WWII action with Luke Goss. A disgraced army captain has a shot at redemption when he's asked to lead a unit on a secret mission behind enemy lines to capture a Nazi super-weapon.

A woman wants he ex-fiancé to pay for not only a credit card bill but the fireplace they once used in their shared home.
Neighbours disagree completely as to the terms of breeding and stud fees after their beloved pets allegedly hook up and start a family.
Passionate about a land purchase, a man claims the seller profited from his hard labour then sold the property for a huge profit.
A man says his roommate broke the lock on his door four times; she claims he assaulted her as she tried to climb in a window.
The Judge is not surprised when a crazy living arrangement does not work out; ex-lovers are left fighting over stolen property and tow fees.
A man gives his ex-wife a car for his younger daughter; she survives a head-on collision in the vehicle but refuses to give him the insurance payout.
A woman, not quite ready for a break up, allegedly keys her ex-lover's car and sprays his home with ketchup; anger management classes are required.
Sisters pull together to pay for their father's funeral only to be pulled apart by life insurance delays; the Judge takes the insurance company to task.
After meeting in a sober living environment, two women decide to become roommates and fight over rent, damaged property and an expensive bed.

Last Seen: This is a gripping series exploring notorious murder cases that transformed idyllic UK rural landscapes into crime scenes.
In 2017, Ellen Higginbottom was murdered by Mark Buckley in Orrell Water Park, Wigan. After fleeing the scene with her laptop and phone, Buckley was caught by police.
In May of 2018, detective Brian Fanion dialled 911. When police arrived at the scene, they found 51-year-old Amy Fanion dead on the dining room floor.
A gunman killed a worker at a manufacturing plant. He hoped to have covered his tracks, but forensics enabled police to track him down.
Find out how police tracked down a killer using a computer, after receiving an anonymous letter about the deaths of several prostitutes.

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. A paroled safe-cracker is approached to join a new gang, but tells Walker and hatches a plan...
Thriller with Russell Crowe. A journalist investigates a connection between the murder of a congressman's intern and the death of a petty crook and uncovers a political conspiracy.
Crime thriller with Liam Hemsworth. A security guard is dragged into helping his friend with a heist that ends up being the biggest armoured car robbery in US history.
Documentary-style drama with Danny Dyer. Hard-drinking Tommy Johnson uses his love of football as an excuse for indulging in violence, but conflicts quickly spiral out of control.
Classic horror starring Christopher Lee and Peter Cushing. When a mysterious frozen creature awakens on the Trans-Siberian Express, two men must fight to contain its awful power.

A man makes the mistake of adding his lover to the deed on his house; she claims he threatened to kill her.
An Uber driver claims a mother/daughter duo took a pick axe to her car; the daughter says she was sucker-punched by the driver.
A woman gets a deal on a paint job then sues the contractor for an allegedly shoddy job, mental anguish and legal fees.
A motorist is accused of tracking down a biker that annoyed him and tackling him into a moving car.
A mum stays at home to care for five children all under the age of four; a heated dispute between her husband and his mum makes matters worse.
When a Slovakian woman's Visa application is denied, she sues small business owners for allegedly scamming her with a thousand-dollar application process.
A short-lived romance ends with a woman receiving a $2,900 car from her lover the same month she breaks up with him.
When an electricity bill reaches the thousands, an engaged gay couple take a family member to court; the foreclosed home goes up in smoke.
A property on the border of Mexico is at the heart of a tenant/landlord dispute in which marijuana, vandalism and water rights come into play.

Lost Innocence: This is a gripping series exploring notorious murder cases that transformed idyllic UK rural landscapes into crime scenes.
In this gripping episode, we explore the tragic story of Sarah Williams, whose obsession with former fireman Ian Johnston leads to the murder of his new partner, Sadie Hartley.
Nicki Myers Bates was just seven years old in 2006 when her mother vanished and the man her mum lived with told police he watched her die.
A respected physician is murdered and investigators must use the knowledge of cell phone mapping and wiretapping to catch the killer.
The family of a dead man claimed he had gone out walking alone and never returned.

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. Drug gangs recruit middle-schoolers, resulting in a turf war that puts students in danger.
Action thriller sequel with Jason Statham. Hitman Arthur Bishop is blackmailed into committing three assassinations when his arch-enemy Crain kidnaps his girlfriend.
Thriller with Michael Douglas. While trying to expose a neo-Nazi who infiltrated the White House, a Secret Service agent is framed for murder and his protege is told to bring him to justice.
